headerDisplay: Connect your Whirlpool, Maytag, or KitchenAid washer and dryer to HomeKit. Appliances appear as outlets — On means running, Off means idle.

username.title: Email
username.description: Your Whirlpool / Maytag / KitchenAid app login email

brand.title: Brand
brand.description: The brand of your appliance / the app you use to sign in

pollSeconds.title: Poll Interval (seconds)
pollSeconds.description: How often to check appliance status (minimum 30s)

includeAll.title: Include All Appliances
includeAll.description: Include all appliance types, not just washers and dryers
